channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Aaron Rodgers spotted strolling on beach while NFL awaits free agent decision
item.description: Aaron Rodgers, whose free agency decision the entire NFL world is waiting on, was spotted strolling on a beach seemingly content as he stared off into the distance.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohtani's Tokyo airport arrival hidden from fans hoping to catch a glimpse of Japanese star
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Hundreds of fans at Tokyo’s Haneda Airport, who lined up 10 deep and hoped to catch a glimpse of Shohei Ohtani as he arrived on Thursday, saw nothing of the Los Angeles Dodgers superstar.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mountour scores fastest OT goal in NHL history in Kraken's comeback win over Canadiens
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Brandon Mountour had the fastest goal in NHL overtime history, scoring his second goal of the game four seconds into the extra period to give the Seattle Kraken a 5-4 comeback victory over the Montreal Canadiens on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Former Super Bowl MVPs Aaron Rodgers and Cooper Kupp hit the open market
item.description: The NFL league year kicked off Wednesday with two former Super Bowl MVPs hitting the open market. The Los Angeles Rams cut receiver Cooper Kupp just days after signing Davante Adams to be his replacement and the New York Jets released quarterback Aaron Rodgers following a failed two-year stint.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah moves closer to playoff berth with 3-2 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After blowing leads in their two previous meetings with the Anaheim Ducks this season, the Utah Hockey Club wasn't about to let it happen a third time.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UVU advances to WAC Tournament semifinals
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Valley men's basketball team is two wins away from its first ever bid to the NCAA Tournament. Tanner Toolson poured in 16 points as the Wolverines cruised past Utah Tech in the WAC Tournament semifinals Wednesday night at the Orleans Arena in Las Vegas, 74-57.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL players score a shot at Hollywood through hands-on training sessions with filmmaker Deon Taylor
item.description: SANTA MONICA, Calif. (AP) — Isaac Ukwu's sights were solely set on just playing in the NFL — until two season-ending knee injuries in college served as a harsh reality of football's fragility. The setbacks reshaped Ukwu's perspective, showing him that football was part of him, but not all of him.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The 49ers agree to a 2-year contract with QB Mac Jones, AP source says
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Quarterback Mac Jones will finally join the San Francisco 49ers four years after the team nearly drafted him third overall.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Source: 49ers hiring QB Mac Jones four years after nearly drafting him
item.description: Quarterback Mac Jones, passed over by the 49ers with the No. 3 pick in the 2021 NFL Draft, agreed Wednesday night to join them as Brock Purdy's backup on a two-year contract, a league source confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Jazz fined $100,000 for not playing Markkanen
item.description: MEMPHIS (ABC4 Sports) - The NBA on Wednesday fined the Utah Jazz $100,000 for violating its player participation policy.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Celebrini vs. Bedard: What Sharks rookie had this season that Blackhawks star didn’t
item.description: NHL: Macklin Celebrini and the San Jose Sharks host Connor Bedard and the Chicago Blackhawks at SAP Center on Thursday
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Mallory Swanson will miss Chicago Stars' NWSL season opener for personal reasons
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Chicago Stars forward Mallory Swanson will miss the team's National Women's Soccer League season opener on Friday night against the Orlando Pride for personal reasons. Coach Lorne Donaldson said Wednesday that he believed Swanson's status was week-to-week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Indiana Fever guard Sophie Cunningham dishes on why she's not married yet
item.description: Indiana Fever guard Sophie Cunningham got personal with her new fans on social media this week, revealing why she believes she still hasn't found the one.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gonzaga beats No. 19 Saint Mary's 58-51 to capture West Coast Conference Tournament title
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The metrics — and oddsmakers — indicated Gonzaga was far better than its record, and there was little doubt the Bulldogs had the ability to once again compete at a high level. Maybe it was simply a matter of timing.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP Defensive Player of the Year, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bowling Green hires former NFL star running back Eddie George as coach
item.description: Bowling Green hired former NFL running back and Tennessee State coach Eddie George on Sunday as the Falcons' head coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood Academy girls basketball team brings IHSA Class 4A state title back to South Side for 1st time in program history
item.description: NOTE: The attached video is from a feature story by GN Sports' Josh Frydman on the Kenwood Academy boys and girls basketball programs prior to the IHSA State Girls Basketball Tournament over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Texas district attorney declines to pursue charges against Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy
item.description: Xavier Worthy was arrested Friday and has since been released after the county's district attorney said he would not accept the case at this time.
item.dc:creator: Olivia Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs WR Xavier Worthy released after prosecutor declines charges
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Xavier Worthy was released Saturday after a district attorney in Texas declined to pursue charges against the Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver following an arrest in which he had been accused of felony domestic violence.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Yanni Gourde back where he belongs, in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning organization believes that adding two elite forwards Yanni Gourde and Oliver Byorkstrand will be the push they need to make a deep playoff run.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC
